summary: Verified DraftScreen layout rebalance (col-span 5/7) and card grid (grid-cols-3/4/5). All requested layout, grid, and draft-phase flow features confirmed working at 1920x1080 viewport.
verified_features: DRAFT PHASE pitch container has class 'lg:col-span-5' (confirmed via DOM inspection)
DRAFT PHASE right panel has class 'lg:col-span-7' (confirmed via DOM inspection)
Card grid container has 'grid grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-2 max-h-[520px] overflow-y-auto pr-1 mt-3' (matches spec exactly)
At 1920px viewport: exactly 5 cards per row visible (firstRowColumns=5, total=13)
rolled-team-name and rolled-season data-testids visible after lock (e.g. 'Panathinaikos / 1996')
pool-player-N cards clickable, selection highlights eligible pitch slots (cursor:pointer on slots 5,6,7 for LM player)
Placement returns UI back to spin-the-wheel-idle
SPACE bar triggers spin from idle (club-season-spinner appears)
YIL (change-year-button-draft), CHANGE (change-button-draft), YENİ ZAR (reroll-button-draft) buttons all present and clickable
changes-remaining decrements correctly on CHANGE click (3/3 -> 2/3)
back-to-setup-button returns to setup layout with col-span-3 + col-span-6 + col-span-3
SETUP phase 3-column layout intact: lg:col-span-3 / lg:col-span-6 / lg:col-span-3
No console errors during draft interactions
critical_code_review_comments: Setup-phase right roster has data-testid='roster-count' but it's only rendered in setup (line 378). Draft phase only displays changes-remaining. This is by design but worth noting for future testers writing flow tests.
All card grid breakpoints work as advertised (grid-cols-3 base, md:4, xl:5). Verified at 1920px showing 5 cols.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 confirmed the col-span-5/7 layout rebalance and grid-cols-3/4/5 card grid (5 cards per row at 1920px). Full draft → tournament flow not re-run in this iteration since it was regression-validated in iterations 1-17; only layout/grid + core draft-phase interactions (place, reroll, change, SPACE, back-to-setup) were re-verified. Tournament transition tests can rely on prior iterations.
